items.name: T.E Tactical Utility Belt
items.description:
A T.E custom utility belt intended for Law Enforcement or Military use, tried and tested with a quick release buckle setup for emergencies, and multiple necessary pouches including: 

- Dual Handcuff pouches 
- A Glove pouch 
- An Expandable Baton pouch 
- Dual open Mag pouch 
- Small Accessory pouch 
- Tactical Enhancements patented Tac-Light pouch 
- A belt keeper keychain 
- And an Audioverse T.E 2000 Radio pouch 

Variation 2: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/11922435004/T-E-Tactical-Utility-Belt-V-2 

Mixpat operator belt by JohnDrinkin (for those asking for a mixpat variant): https://www.roblox.com/catalog/11972439234/Mixpat-Operator-Belt

More accessories and variations to come! 

The predecessor of these new utility belts, Tactical Pouches ( https://www.roblox.com/catalog/8472988727/Tactical-Pouches ), is being retired from service. Thank you all for the support since my start in UGC back in January, I appreciate it more than you could know.

Stay safe, everyone!
